text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our next objective, the Japanese Derby,
drawing closer, the focus of Symboli Rudolf's
training sessions has shifted to ironing out the
creases.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Another productive session. Thank you for
agreeing to be my partner.

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
N-not at all... Glad to help... Anyway, um... I
should go...

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text: That was... crazy... She's so... fast...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. I apologize for putting you
through so much trouble.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I mean in finding me a training partner. I expect it
wasn't so easy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She can say that again. When I asked people if
they wanted to be running partners with the
Emperor, most of them backed out and said they
weren't qualified.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I had to pull some strings with a fellow trainer to
finally secure someone who was willing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I also owe my partner an apology. I could see that
she was quite shaken.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I try my best not to intimidate those around me,
but I can only hold back so much while on the
track.
choice_data_list: Especially with the real thing on the horizon.
Especially with the real thing on the horizon.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I suspect I'm so on edge that I don't even
realize it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No race symbolizes the dream of all racers quite
like the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It is a prize I must take if I'm to have any pride as
Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There is little time left until the race. We must
buckle down and keep practicing as best we can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf seems fulfilled in mind and body
as she makes progress toward the Japanese
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Forgive me for bringing you all the way to the
student council office.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There's something I want to look over before we
start training. Could you wait here? I won't be
long.
choice_data_list: Are you sure you can't delegate it to anyone?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Unfortunately not, I'm afraid.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The last time I stepped back from my student
council work, I missed the signs that one of my
subordinates was in distress.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I can't let that happen again. The only choice is to
balance both duties.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Besides, if this is beyond me, I have no chance of
realizing my dream.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh? What's this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rudolf comes to a stop in front of the student
council office. A sheet of paper is affixed to the
door.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Air Groove's work, I suspect.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I do appreciate that she's worried for my
well-being...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But still, it's unusual for her to resort to such
drastic measures—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just then, the door is flung open from within.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ugh, forget this nonsense!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Brian. Going somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Funny time for you to drop by, Prez.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm caught in the crossfire between you and Air
Groove.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind explaining to me what is going
on?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I see... So Air Groove has been asking you to
handle the work that would otherwise have come
to me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The Empress wouldn't take no for an answer on
this one. Screwed my schedule right up, too.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I can only apologize. I take full responsibility.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If not for my failings, Air Groove wouldn't have
felt the need to increase your burden in order to
reduce my own.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Once again, this is my fault, not yours. I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm not asking for an apology...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Well, whatever. I'm going on patrol. The rest is
your problem.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Now, then.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
No, this needs to be revised. We'll have to ask
them to recalculate it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Now, what's next...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: President? Aren't you supposed to be training?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: What are you working on?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I was reviewing the council's budget proposal for
the upcoming academic period.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That must be a lot of work. Let me lend a hand.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Absolutely not! I am doing this specifically to reduce your burden.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This is no time for you to be filing paperwork. I'll
take care of this while you focus on—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Remind me, Air Groove. Which one of us is the
president?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Delegating the student council's workload is my
job. You can trust me to do it, no matter what
else I might be dealing with.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: With all due respect—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Do you truly have so little faith in me?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Do you truly believe I would let my student
council activities lead to defeat on the track?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Then what's the harm?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...For what it's worth, I do appreciate the
sentiment.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Apologies, Trainer, but I must attend to this. I'll
be right with you.
choice_data_list: Is there anything I can do?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Well, since you're offering, I suppose there
is.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry to burden you with busywork, but could
you help organize these files?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your help.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
More work keeps on popping up, to the point
where our training session ends up delayed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Regardless, Symboli Rudolf insists on training for
the allotted time.
